'''Praxlis''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] within the area of space that the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] assigned to [[Sixth Negative Regions|Black Sword Command]].<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|III|42|Praxlis}}</ref>
